items.title: IEEE Signal Processing Cup at ICASSP 2025
items.description: Secured 1st Runner-Up in the 'Deepfake Face Detection in the Wild' challenge at IEEE ICASSP 2025, leading the BUET team.

items.title: The Global Undergraduate Awards
items.description: Undergraduate thesis recognized among the top undergraduate research worldwide in the Computer Science category.

items.title: Dean's List Award & University Merit, BUET
items.description: Awarded the Dean's List for outstanding academic performance in three academic years, and University Merit for two semesters at BUET.

items.title: Intra BUET CTF 2023
items.description: Achieved 2nd place among 35 teams in the cybersecurity competition organized by the BUET Cyber Security Club.

items.title: BD-Flag Hunt CTF 2022
items.description: Ranked 9th among 100+ teams in this national cybersecurity challenge.

items.title: Microcontroller, Microprocessor and Embedded System Sessional Project
items.description: A 6-DOF robotic arm mounted on a bot, awarded Honorable Mention in the CSE Department, BUET.
